interpretation_guardrails.ranking_definition: Descending 2023 MtCO2e/yr for this one harmonized metric only; ties must remain ties.
interpretation_guardrails.required_label: Harmonized estimate: economy-wide GHG excluding LULUCF (AR6 GWP100)
required_caveats: International-bunker treatment is not asserted from the selected CSV rows; verify the PRIMAP category definition before comparison with a frame that includes or excludes bunker memo items.
The selected CSV rows do not provide uncertainty bounds; normalized values must not be presented as uncertainty-free.
